text: 2025 was widely called the "Year of the Agent" across the AI industry, marking a transition from passive conversational AI to autonomous systems capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and independent action
By 2026, AI agents are deployed across software engineering , general task automation , and enterprise workflow automation
An AI agent is an autonomous system that combines a foundation model with reasoning, planning, memory, and tool-use capabilities to accomplish goals without continuous human supervision
